title: Toasty Smoky Malaysian White Cabbage Toast
description: A smoky and glassy-jelly Malaysian dish featuring white cabbage and toast, perfect for a crowd, and keto-friendly. It is typically served on a lazy-susan-spinner vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together shredded white cabbage, smoked paprika, coconut oil, garlic, ginger, salt, pepper, and chili flakes.
Spread the cabbage mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the cabbage is roasting, toast the bread cubes until crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together fish sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Once the cabbage is done, remove it from the oven and brush the fish sauce mixture on top.
To assemble the dish, place the toasted bread cubes on a lazy-susan-spinner vessel and top with the roasted cabbage mixture.
Garnish with additional smoked paprika and chili flakes if desired.
